name: portfolio-web
description: Static front-end for the portfolio site; built and embedded into the Go binary.

scripts.cv:pdf: cd cv && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error resume.tex && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error resume.tex && cp resume.pdf ../public/resume.pdf
scripts.cv:build: npm run cv:data && npm run cv:pdf
